scripts.d1:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute mailagents-local --local --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute mailagents-local --local --file=./migrations/0002_idempotency_keys.sql
scripts.d1:migrate:remote:dev: wrangler d1 execute mailagents-dev --remote --env dev --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute mailagents-dev --remote --env dev --file=./migrations/0002_idempotency_keys.sql
scripts.d1:migrate:remote:staging: wrangler d1 execute mailagents-staging --remote --env staging --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute mailagents-staging --remote --env staging --file=./migrations/0002_idempotency_keys.sql
scripts.d1:migrate:remote:production: wrangler d1 execute mailagents-production --remote --env production --file=./migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute mailagents-production --remote --env production --file=./migrations/0002_idempotency_keys.sql
